subcodes.first_line: O Mihdi! Through the grace of God - exalted be His glory - mayest thou be successful and be adorned with the ornament of steadfastness among all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مهدی انشاء الله بعنایت حق جل جلاله موفق باشی و بطراز استقامت مزین جمیع من
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @high station of the true believer, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
